about.history: Smilecare Dentist opened in Vashi to bring hospital-grade clinical standards into a warm neighbourhood clinic. What began as a focused endodontic practice has grown into a full-spectrum dental home for Navi Mumbai families.
about.mission: To deliver precise, gentle dental care that patients understand and trust — every visit, every smile.
about.vision: To be Navi Mumbai’s most trusted dental clinic for comfort-led, technology-enabled oral healthcare.

values.title: Patient first
values.description: Your comfort and clarity guide every decision.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Clear plans, honest timelines, no surprises.

values.title: Sterile safety
values.description: Rigorous sterilization you can see and trust.

achievements: Digital diagnostics across all treatment rooms
about.sterilization: Every instrument follows a tracked sterilization cycle with Class-B autoclaves, sealed pouches, and single-use disposables wherever clinically appropriate. Surfaces are disinfected between patients using medical-grade protocols.
about.philosophy: We believe great dentistry is quiet confidence — skilled hands, clear communication, and a clinic designed to put you at ease.

whyChooseUs.title: Gentle, explained care
whyChooseUs.description: We walk you through options before we begin — so you always know what happens next.

whyChooseUs.title: Modern diagnostics
whyChooseUs.description: Digital imaging and precise planning for predictable, minimally invasive treatment.

whyChooseUs.title: Hospital-grade hygiene
whyChooseUs.description: Visible sterilization standards and single-patient instrument protocols.

whyChooseUs.title: Family-friendly clinic
whyChooseUs.description: From first check-ups to smile makeovers — one trusted dental home for all ages.

seo.defaultTitle: Smilecare Dentist | Premium Dental Clinic in Navi Mumbai
seo.defaultDescription: Book an appointment at Smilecare Dentist, Vashi — trusted dental care for root canals, implants, whitening, braces, and family dentistry in Navi Mumbai.
